/.title: Photo Angle — Website Template
/.description: Photo Angle is a modern photography portfolio template for a photographer, built to showcase portraits, personal branding, couples, and lifestyle photography.
h1: Photography that captures real moments, beautifully
h2: I photograph people as they really are
p: Portraits, personal branding, couples, and lifestyle sessions with a natural, timeless feel

I'm Lisa — a portrait and lifestyle photographer based in New York. I specialize in natural, timeless imagery that feels editorial but never staged. My goal is simple: your photos should look like you, just beautifully lit.
Whether you're refreshing your headshot, documenting your brand, or capturing a milestone — I'll guide you through a relaxed session that delivers images you'll actually want to use.
Sessions feel easy and natural — no stiff poses.
I direct you every step. You won't feel lost.
Clean, consistent edits that enhance without overdoing it.
Help with outfits, locations, and timing before the shoot.
Your curated gallery delivered within 48 hours.
Every image meets the same high standard.
Every session is tailored to you — your style, your timeline, your goals. Here's what we can create together.
Polished, natural portraits for social media, personal milestones, or professional use.
Strategic imagery for entrepreneurs and creatives building trust with their audience.
Genuine, unposed moments for couples who want something natural and romantic.
Real connections, real smiles — beautifully documented for families of every size.
Candid, high-quality coverage for corporate events, launches, and private gatherings.
Reach out via the form or email. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
A quick call to nail down location, outfits, mood, and timeline.
Show up and relax. I'll guide you through everything.
Your edited gallery delivered within 48 hours, ready to share.
Natural light, clean compositions, genuine expressions. A timeless editorial style with warmth.
"Lisa made me feel completely at ease. The photos came out better than I imagined — natural, polished, and exactly what my brand needed."
"We're not 'photo people' at all, but Lisa guided us through everything. The images feel genuine and we can't stop looking at them."
"From planning to delivery, the whole experience was seamless. Lisa has a real talent for making you look and feel like yourself — just elevated."
A focused portrait session — perfect for headshots and profile updates.
Our go-to package for branding, couples, and personal projects.
A half-day session with full creative direction and planning.
